heading: Naval Small Craft Instruction and Technical Training School
label: 352 Naval Small Craft Instruction and Technical Training School

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall operate an education and training facility known as the “Naval Small Craft Instruction and Technical Training School” (in this section referred to as the “School”).

children.heading: .—Designation of Executive Agent
children.label: b .—Designation of Executive Agent
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall designate the Secretary of a military department as the Department of Defense executive agent for carrying out the responsibilities of the Secretary of Defense under this section.
the operation, employment, maintenance, and logistics of specialized equipment;

children.label: B
children.text: coalition or international military operations; and

children.label: B
children.text: the military and other security forces of the one or more friendly foreign countries.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Personnel Eligible To Receive Education and Training
children.label: d .—Limitation on Personnel Eligible To Receive Education and Training
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may not provide education or training at the School to any personnel of a country that is prohibited from receiving such education or training under any other provision of law.

children.label: A
children.text: The costs of operating and maintaining the School may be paid from amounts made available to the Navy for operation and maintenance.

children.label: B
children.text: The costs of the equipment requirements of the School may be paid from amounts made available to the Navy for procurement.

children.label: C
children.text: The costs of the facilities construction requirements of the School may be paid from amounts made available to the Navy for military construction.

children.label: A
children.text: The costs of providing food services to personnel, visitors, and international students at the School.

children.label: B
children.text: The costs of operating, maintaining, and sustaining a dining facility or contracted food services at the School.
Tuition fees charged for personnel who attend the School may not include any amount for the fixed costs of operating and maintaining the School.

children.heading: .—Annual Report
children.label: f .—Annual Report
children.text: Not later than March 15 each year, the Secretary of Defense, with the concurrence of the Secretary of State, shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a detailed report on the activities and operating costs of the School during the preceding fiscal year.
